name: bandit.roof_fire_horde_nice_roof_fire_mcw
description: Nice roof-fire horde playtest for CAOL-ROOF-HORDE-NICE-FIRE-v0: start from the saved normal player-created roof/elevated fire world captured in run 20260429_172847, re-audit the credible roof brazier/fire before waiting, prove a plausible staged horde before waiting, run bounded in-game time, require same-run live roof-fire horde signal artifacts, then save and inspect direct horde response metadata plus cost/stability report fields.

steps.label: roof_fire_split_wait_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen from the saved player-created roof-fire world; this proves startup/load only before saved metadata and bounded wait prove the split-run horde path

steps.label: normal_map_before_split_roof_fire_horde_wait
steps.abort_reason: split-run load did not land on normal map UI before bounded horde wait; do not credit wait/horde proof from a stale or wrong screen
steps.expected_visible_fact: normal map UI is visible before any wait input is sent from the saved player-created roof-fire footing

steps.label: audit_saved_roof_fire_target_before_horde_wait
steps.abort_reason: split-run source world no longer contains the source-run player-created roof/elevated f_brazier plus fd_fire before bounded horde wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: split-run saved map metadata still contains the source-run player-created roof/elevated f_brazier + fd_fire before any bounded horde wait; no fixture fd_fire transform is applied in this fixture
steps.next_step_gate: only proceed to bounded horde wait if this roof-fire result-state gate is green

steps.label: audit_saved_turn_before_roof_fire_horde_wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved player turn baseline is recorded before the bounded roof-fire horde wait so the final guarded save can prove elapsed in-game time

steps.label: audit_saved_horde_before_split_roof_fire_horde_wait
steps.abort_reason: split-run saved overmap horde_map metadata did not contain the staged mon_zombie horde before the bounded roof-fire wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved overmap horde_map metadata contains the staged horde before the split-run bounded roof-fire wait; horde staging is setup-only and must change after the signal

steps.label: wait_5_minutes_for_roof_fire_horde_signal
steps.abort_reason: bounded 5-minute wait was interrupted or left a prompt visible after the explicit captured I-ignore retry budget; screenshot/OCR artifacts classify the blocker before any further proof is credited
steps.expected_visible_fact: the real wait UI is opened from the loaded post-fire gameplay state, Wait a while is chosen, 5 minutes is selected, and same-run artifacts must show live roof-fire light reaching the horde signal bridge; if the roof fire heat/hurt prompt interrupts, the harness records it and presses case-sensitive I to ignore the distraction before continuing the bounded wait.
steps.failure_rule: If the split-run wait is interrupted, signal artifacts are absent, or elapsed time cannot be proven by the later saved turn delta, this packet is inconclusive/non-green. A handled interruption is only green if the final wait ledger/artifact delta prove elapsed wait/signal state.

steps.label: audit_roof_fire_horde_light_signal_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not contain roof-fire live-light horde signal lines after the bounded wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run split-run debug artifact contains live light scan and horde light signal lines from the player-created roof fire source

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_roof_fire_horde_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after the roof-fire horde wait and before guarded save/writeback

steps.label: request_direct_save_after_roof_fire_horde_wait
steps.abort_reason: after requesting a save following the bounded roof-fire horde wait, OCR did not show the Save and quit prompt before uppercase-Y confirmation
steps.expected_visible_fact: Save command is requested after the bounded roof-fire wait; mtime proves acceptance after confirmation

steps.label: confirm_direct_save_after_roof_fire_horde_wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: uppercase Y confirms the recorded save prompt; following mtime/state gates prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_roof_fire_horde_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the post-wait roof-fire horde save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed post-wait save, proving the following turn/map/horde metadata reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_turn_after_roof_fire_horde_wait
steps.abort_reason: saved player turn counter did not advance by at least 250 turns after the bounded wait and guarded save
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved player turn counter advanced by a bounded 5-minute-scale delta after the real wait UI path

steps.label: audit_saved_roof_fire_target_after_wait
steps.abort_reason: saved roof target metadata did not contain player-created f_brazier plus fd_fire after the normal deploy/lighter path and bounded wait
steps.expected_visible_fact: split-run saved map metadata after bounded wait/save still contains roof/elevated terrain plus the player-created f_brazier/fd_fire provenance from source run 20260429_172847

steps.label: audit_saved_horde_after_roof_fire_signal_wait
steps.abort_reason: saved overmap horde_map metadata did not show the staged horde moved/retargeted to the roof-fire source after the bounded wait and save
steps.expected_visible_fact: split-run saved overmap horde_map metadata shows the staged mon_zombie horde changed from its baseline: same horde location, destination retargeted to the roof-fire source submap, and positive movement budget after live horde light signaling

evidence_contract.claim: a source-run normal player-created roof/elevated brazier fire can be reused as a nice roof-fire footing and drive bounded live horde light-signal/response proof through the real gameplay path
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for nice roof-fire horde response
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No roof-horde credit if startup/load, saved roof f_brazier/fd_fire provenance, before-wait horde footing, bounded wait, same-run horde light-signal artifact, save/writeback, turn delta, cost/stability report, or saved horde response metadata is missing or non-green.
